owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

MASTER_ORACLE().notice: Returns the Master Hybrid Oracle address

WETH().notice: Returns the global WETH address used as collateral

allMarkets(uint256).notice: Fetches a deployed market address directly from the array by index

allMarketsLength().notice: Returns the total number of markets (CDPs) deployed by this factory

constructor.notice: Set the global WETH and Master Oracle addresses upon factory deployment

createMarket((string,string),(uint256,ui.notice: Deploys a new Synthetic Fiat Token, its paired CDP Engine, and registers it to the Oracle

getMarket(address,address).notice: Fetches the deployed BorrowStable engine for a specific StableCoin and Collateral pair

getMarketAtIndex(uint256).notice: Fetches a specific market by its index
